shots.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
shots.notes: Hook shot opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup, separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; never place baby bottle inside the cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

shots.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：呈现痛点（传统暖奶器太大不便携）
shots.copy: A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand.
shots.notes: Dim nursery bedroom at night, cold milk in baby bottle beside bedside table, separate portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup on nightstand, soft shadows, slow push-in, no person face, no medical claim, USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup, separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; never place baby bottle inside the cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device, 9:16 USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup, separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; never place baby bottle inside the cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device

shots.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：奶倒入恒温杯加热，再倒出到奶瓶（便携可充电设计、外出随时加热；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器））
shots.copy: USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.
shots.notes: Product demo, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, hands pouring milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, then pouring warm milk OUT into baby bottle, USB-C port visible, clear product shape, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup, separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; never place baby bottle inside the cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready.
